accept.description: Type(s) of external draggable items this sortable accepts

itemType.description: Default item type for items within this sortable

itemTypeProp.description: Property name on items to get their type (for mixed item types)

allowRemove.description: Auto-remove items from source list on cross-container drop (default false — manage removal in destination onDrop)

showPlaceholder.description: Whether to show a placeholder drop zone at the end

dropIndicator.description: Drop indicator style — 'line' shows an insertion line between items, 'highlight' glows the slot

gap.description: Gap between items (any valid CSS length)

as.description: HTML tag name for the container element

provideDropRef.description: Pass drop ref to children render function

provideDragRef.description: Pass drag ref to children render function

onChange.type: (items: T[], args?: any, event?: SortableChangeEvent) => void
onChange.description: Callback when items are reordered or changed

onDrop.type: (source: DragItem, target: DropResult, args?: any) => void
onDrop.description: Callback when an external item is dropped

onRemove.type: (removed: { index: number; id?: string | number }, dropResult: DropResult | null) => void
onRemove.description: Callback when an item is removed (dragged out)

children.type: (item: T, index: number, refs: { draggable?: DraggableRenderProps; droppable?: DroppableRenderProps }) => ReactNode
